|---|---|

    types.ts             ← PulseBoardAccount, PulseBoardConfig, PulseBoardMessage, ResolvedPulseBoardAccount
    runtime.ts           ← createPluginRuntimeStore → getPulseBoardRuntime / setPulseBoardRuntime
    channel.ts           ← createChatChannelPlugin → pulseBoardPlugin
```

### Key implementation decisions

| Decision | Rationale |
|---|---|
| `getChatChannelMeta("pulseboard" as any)` | `"pulseboard"` isn't in the `ChatChannelId` union yet; the cast is intentional — meta is populated from the manifest at runtime when the plugin registers |
| `ResolvedPulseBoardAccount extends PulseBoardAccount { accountId: string }` | Required by `createChatChannelPlugin<TResolvedAccount extends { accountId?: string | null }>` generic constraint |
| Flat `outbound` shape (Nostr-style, not IRC `attachedResults`) | Matches the simpler two-adapter-supported pattern; `attachChannelToResult` wraps the result correctly |
| `setup.applyAccountConfig: ({ cfg }) => cfg` | Minimal stub returning config unchanged |
| `gateway.startAccount` logs via `ctx.log?.info(...)` | `log` is optional on `ChannelGatewayContext`; optional chaining is required |
| `.js` extensions on all local imports | TypeScript ESM mode resolves `.js` → `.ts` at compile time |
